title: /! run shell command and send stdout
description: Slash command: /! <shell command> — run the command in a subprocess, capture stdout, send the output as a chat message. Useful for sharing command output without leaving the chat. Should cap output length (e.g. 4KB) and indicate truncation. Stderr discarded or shown locally only.
close_reason: implemented in cli/src/commands.rs: /who, /me (CTCP ACTION), /cat (4KB text file), /! (shell stdout), /alias (contacts.json persistence), /clear; Ctrl+L handled natively by rustyline
